tracks.rawText: 1:33[Rec] Mar 27 10:33:24CustomCoverBoom bap hip hop featuring a prominent jazz-influenced upright bass line and a sampled piano loop, The drums consist of a gritty, lo-fi kick and a crisp snare with a slight swing on the sixteenth notes, A recurring three-note piano motif repeats every two bars, A high-pitched, filtered synth whistle enters periodically, The track is in the key of C minor at 92 BPM, The bass line follows a syncopated pattern emphasizing the root and fifth, Subtle vinyl crackle and hiss are layered throughout the mix, The arrangement is minimalist, focusing on the interplay between the rhythmic piano stabs and the steady backbeatPublishRemix
